name: Changelog Generator
description: AI-powered changelog generator that takes a GitHub repository URL and date range, then produces a professional, well-structured changelog with sections for features, bug fixes, improvements, and breaking changes.
features: Generate professional changelogs from GitHub repo activity
Structured sections: Features, Bug Fixes, Improvements, Breaking Changes
Plain English summary for non-technical stakeholders
